tasks.summary: Implement invite creation and duplicate-pending guard
tasks.description: Add backend behavior for creating a pending invite and rejecting duplicate pending invites so the core flow matches the approved spec.
definition_of_done: Submitting a valid new email creates exactly one pending invite and queues one invite email.
Submitting an email with an existing pending invite does not create a second invite and returns actionable feedback.
The task outcome aligns with `sc-send-invite`, `sc-block-duplicate-invite`, `ac-invite-created`, and `ac-no-duplicate-pending`.

tasks.summary: Show pending invites on the members page
tasks.description: Update the members page so a successful invite appears immediately with pending status and duplicate invite feedback is visible in the UI.
definition_of_done: After a successful invite, the invited email appears with pending status without requiring a page reload.
Duplicate pending invite submissions show clear feedback in the members page flow.
The task outcome aligns with `sc-send-invite`, `sc-block-duplicate-invite`, and `ac-pending-visible`.

tasks.summary: Add regression coverage for invite flow
tasks.description: Add test coverage for invite creation, duplicate invite blocking, and pending invite visibility so reviewer checks can map directly to approved scenarios and acceptance criteria.
definition_of_done: Unit coverage exists for invite creation and duplicate pending invite rejection.
Integration or end-to-end coverage exists for pending invite visibility from the members page.
The task outcome aligns with `tc-invite-service-creates-pending`, `tc-members-page-shows-pending`, and `tc-admin-sends-invite`.
